description: The LegacySegmentCircleProgress component was used to handle progress bars on arc circles. Was used in loading progress bars.

fields.Stage: The stage in loading the progress bar is at.
fields._progressText: The progress text indicator visual used to indicate the current progress.
fields._detailText: The detail text indicator visual used to indicate the current progress details.
fields._material: The material used in the visual.
fields._tint: The field to drive with the progress bar tint.

usage: Not used directly by the user. Used in legacy content.
